evals.expected_output: Returns an implementation review report with Architecture, Design, Devex, Security, Testing, Fix Priority, Advisor Budget Report, and Completion Status sections.
expectations: Every finding includes a file/line or verified command output
Phase 1 and Phase 2 findings keep [P1] and [P2] provenance markers
Advisor calls are counted and capped by --advisor-budget
Confidence Gate band maps to DONE, DONE_WITH_CONCERNS, BLOCKED, or NEEDS_CONTEXT
